# suggestedPageSize

**Instance Property**

Retrieves the suggested number of items to include in a page.

## Declaration

```swift
var suggestedPageSize: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

This value is a suggested upper limit for the number of contact items you can pass in the aggregate calls to [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemContentObserver/didEnumerate(_:)]. Exceeding this limit may result in memory issues.
title: suggestedPageSize
